pageContext.name: Pop Up Parade Eren Yeager: Attack Titan Version XL
pageContext.description: Pop Up Parade XL hits the scene in a big way! From 'Attack on Titan' comes a gigantic Eren Yeager figure of Eren in titan form! Owing to the figure's massive size, Eren's intimidating expression has been captured in detail like never seen before!  Pop Up Parade anime figures are now available in stunning 40cm XL size! Featuring stunning sculpting and paintwork that can only be enjoyed at this size! POP UP PARADE is bringing figure fans a brand new sense of excitement with the XL line.   Add to your Attack on Titan figure collection today!
